This report keeps them\n33\tstrictly separate:\n34\t\n35\t| Concept | Where | What it is | Identity fields? |\n36\t|---|---|---|---|\n37\t| **Spaxel domain blob** (the tracked spatial presence) | `mothership/**` (Go) + `dashboard/js/**` (JS) | A detected person: position + velocity + posture + **identity** | **Yes** — the whole point of this work |\n38\t| **Browser `Blob` API** (binary data for downloads) | `dashboard/**/fleet*.js` | `new Blob([bytes], {type:'text/csv'})` — a file-download payload | **No** — unrelated; do **not** touch for identity work |\n39\t\n40\tThe `new Blob()` sites from bf-5kns are all the second kind. They are catalogued in §4 only\n41\tso the next bead knows they exist and can **skip them**.\n42\t\n43\t### 1.2 Corrections to the source findings (verified against HEAD)\n44\t\n45\t1. **`dashboard/js/state.js:290`** — bf-26ta reported the literal initializes\n46\t   `{id, personName:undefined, assignedColor:undefined, identityResolved:undefined}`.\n47\t   **Actual current code is just `{ id: id }`.** The identity fields are no longer\n48\t   pre-initialized; `Object.assign(appState.blobs[id], updates)` later merges server data in.\n49\t   Implication: if identity-field initialization at creation is desired, this site is a\n50\t   candidate to revisit — but it currently does **not** set them.\n51\t\n52\t2. **`mothership/internal/tracking/tracker.go:160` (2D `tracking.Blob`)** — bf-26ta claimed the\n53\t   literal explicitly sets `PersonName:\"\", AssignedColor:\"\", IdentityResolved:false`.\n54\t   **Wrong on all three field names.** The struct's identity fields are\n55\t   `PersonID / PersonLabel / PersonColor / IdentityConfidence / IdentitySource / IdentityLastSeen`\n56\t   (same as the 3D `tracker.Blob`), and the literal sets **none** of them — it relies on Go\n57\t   zero values. See §3, entries [G2]/[A2].\n58\t\n59\t3. **Go ↔ JS identity field names differ** (this is intentional, not an error — but the next\n60\t   bead must know both):\n61\t\n62\t   | Concept | Go field (`tracker.Blob`, `tracking.Blob`, `sigproc.TrackedBlob`) | JS field (`spaxel.d.ts` Blob interface) |\n63\t   |---|---|---|\n64\t   | Display name | `PersonLabel` | `personName` (preferred) / `personLabel` (deprecated) |\n65\t   | Stable person id | `PersonID` | `personId` |\n66\t   | Render color | `PersonColor` | `assignedColor` (preferred) / `personColor` (deprecated) |\n67\t   | Identity resolved flag | `IdentityConfidence` (float) + `IdentitySource` | `identityResolved` (bool) |\n68\t   | Match provenance | `IdentitySource` (`\"ble_triangulation\"` / `\"ble_only\"` / `\"\"`) | `identityResolved` tri-state |\n69\t\n70\t---\n71\t\n72\t## 2. Inventory — organized by CREATION PATTERN\n125\t\n126\t### Pattern 1 — Peak emission (origin of every blob)\n127\t- **[C1] `(*fusion.Engine).Fuse`** — `fusion/fusion.go:165` → literal `:260`\n128\t  ```go\n129\t  blobs[i] = Blob{X: p[0], Y: p[1], Z: p[2], Confidence: p[3]}\n130\t  ```\n131\t  Value-type per grid peak. **No identity** (peaks are pre-identity). This is the raw\n132\t  measurement fed downstream.\n133\t\n134\t### Pattern 2 — Persistent track spawn (where identity is attached)\n135\t- **[A1] `(*tracker.Tracker).Update` (3D)** — `tracker/tracker.go:112` → literal `:162`\n136\t  ```go\n137\t  b := &Blob{ID: t.nextID, X: m[0], Y: m[1], Z: m[2], Weight: m[3],\n138\t      LastSeen: now, Trail: ..., Posture: PostureUnknown, ukf: NewUKF(...)}\n139\t  ```\n140\t  Pointer per unmatched measurement. **Identity fields exist on the struct but are NOT set\n141\t  in the literal** (zero-valued: `\"\"`/`0`/zero-time). Identity is stamped later by `applyIdentity`.\n142\t- **[A3] `(*tracker.TrackManager).Update[WithIdentity]`** — `tracker/identity.go:63,77`\n143\t  Thin wrappers over A1; delegate creation, then call `applyIdentity(blob, info, now)`\n144\t  (`identity.go:164`) to populate identity in place. **No literal of their own.**\n145\t- **[A2] `(*tracking.Tracker).Update` (2D, legacy)** — `tracking/tracker.go:91` → literal `:160`\n146\t  Same shape as A1 but 2D `[x,z,weight]`. Struct carries the same identity fields; literal\n147\t  sets none of them.\n148\t\n149\t### Pattern 3 — Accessor factories (hand copies/pointers to callers)\n150\t- **[B1] `(*tracker.TrackManager).GetBlob`** — `tracker/identity.go:188` — returns `&tm.blobs[i]`\n151\t  (pointer into internal storage).\n152\t- **[B2] `(*tracker.TrackManager).GetAllBlobs`** — `tracker/identity.go:201` — `make`+`copy`\n153\t  value slice. **Note:** shallow copy — trail header shared, not deep-copied.\n154\t\n155\t### Pattern 4 — Cross-package conversion (identity-propagation boundary — see §5)\n156\t- **[E1] `(*blobTracker).track`** — `cmd/mothership/main.go:5337` → literal `:5384`\n157\t  ```go\n158\t  b := sigproc.TrackedBlob{ID: id, X: pk.X, Y: pk.Y, Z: pk.Z, Weight: pk.Confidence}\n159\t  ```\n160\t  Converts a `fusion.Blob` peak → `sigproc.TrackedBlob`. `sigproc.TrackedBlob` **has identity\n161\t  fields** but they're left zero here because the source is a pre-identity peak.\n162\t- **[E2] automation conversion loop** — `cmd/mothership/main.go:2213`\n163\t  ```go\n164\t  autoBlobs[i] = automation.TrackedBlob{ID: b.ID, X/Z, VX/VY/VZ, Confidence: b.Weight}\n165\t  ```\n166\t  `automation.TrackedBlob` has **NO identity fields** (struct is ID + pos + vel + Confidence\n167\t  only). Identity is **dropped** at this boundary.\n168\t- **[E3] explainability conversion loop** — `cmd/mothership/main.go:2116`\n169\t  ```go\n170\t  blobSnapshots = append(blobSnapshots, explainability.BlobSnapshot{\n171\t      ID: blob.ID, X/Y/Z, Confidence: blob.Weight})\n172\t  ```\n173\t  `explainability.BlobSnapshot` struct — identity **dropped** (only the 5 fields shown).\n174\t\n175\t### Pattern 5 — Synthetic/demo factories (offline + test paths)\n176\t- **[D1] `(*simulator.Engine).detectBlobs`** — `simulator/engine.go:387` → `:460` —\n177\t  `append(blobs, BlobResult{ID, Position, Confidence, WalkerID, TrueError})`.\n178\t- **[D2] `(*replay.Pipeline).generateDemoBlobs`** — `replay/pipeline.go:100` → `:114`,`:132` —\n179\t  two fixed-ID figure-8 / circular synthetic `BlobUpdate`s.\n180\t\n181\t### Pattern 6 — Explainability record factories\n182\t- **[F1] `(*explainability.Handler).computeExplanation`** — `handler.go:356` → `:357` —\n183\t  substantive `&BlobExplanation{BlobID, X/Y/Z, Confidence, ContributingLinks, ...}`. Cached\n184\t  into `h.blobHistory[blob.ID]`.\n185\t- **[F2] `(*explainability.Handler).explainBlob`** — `handler.go:180` → `:194` —\n186\t  empty fallback `&BlobExplanation{...0...}` for unknown ID.\n187\t- **[F3] `(*explainability.Handler).explainBlobAtTime`** — `handler.go:209` → `:255` —\n188\t  empty fallback (with `Timestamp`) when no history match.\n189\t- **[F4] `(*explainability.Handler).GetExplanationForBlob`** — `handler.go:276` —\n190\t  lookup accessor returning cached `*BlobExplanation` (no literal).\n191\t\n192\t### Pattern 7 — Snapshot recorder (blob-derived record, not a returned blob)\n193\t- **[G1] `(*falldetect.Detector).processBlob`** — `falldetect/detector.go:270` → `:277` —\n194\t  `BlobSnapshot{ID, X/Y/Z, VX/VY/VZ, Posture, Timestamp}` appended to `d.blobHistory`.\n195\t  (Distinct type from `explainability.BlobSnapshot` despite the shared name.)\n196\t\n197\t### Pattern 8 — JS state initialization\n198\t- **`dashboard/js/state.js:290`** — `appState.blobs[id] = { id: id }` (+ later `Object.assign`\n199\t  of server payload). Identity fields only appear if the server sends them.\n200\t\n201\t### Pattern 9 — JS derived/extrapolation state\n202\t- **`dashboard/js/websocket.js:167`** — `_blobStates.set(b.id, {x,z,vx,vz,ts})`. Minimal\n203\t  dead-reckoning cache for disconnect extrapolation. Not a domain blob.\n204\t\n205\t---\n206\t\n207\t## 4. Files requiring updates for blob identity fields ⭐ (the deliverable)\n225\t\n226\tThe goal of the umbrella effort is to make blob **identity** (who the blob is) flow correctly\n227\tthrough the pipeline. Identity currently lives in **three** Go types and the JS interface,\n228\tand is **dropped at two conversion boundaries**. Ranked by impact:\n229\t\n230\t### Tier 1 — Identity is DROPPED at conversion (must add fields + propagate)\n231\t\n232\t| # | File:line | What's dropped | Source has it? | Target type | Fix |\n233\t|---|---|---|---|---|---|\n234\t| 1 | `cmd/mothership/main.go:2213` | person/color/source from tracked blob | **Yes** (`blobs[i]` is identity-bearing) | `automation.TrackedBlob` | Add identity fields to `automation.TrackedBlob` (`engine.go:1337`); populate them in the loop |\n235\t| 2 | `cmd/mothership/main.go:2116` | person/color from tracked blob | **Yes** | `explainability.BlobSnapshot` | Add identity fields to the snapshot type; populate so \"Why?\" can name the person |\n236\t\n237\t> These two are the highest-value edits: without them, person-aware automations and\n238\t> person-labeled explainability cannot work even when BLE identity is fully resolved upstream.\n239\t\n240\t### Tier 2 — Identity fields exist but literal doesn't set them (verify intent)\n241\t\n242\t| # | File:line | Type | Current state | Action |\n243\t|---|---|---|---|---|\n244\t| 3 | `internal/tracker/tracker.go:162` | `tracker.Blob` (3D) | Identity fields zero-valued; populated later by `applyIdentity` (`identity.go:164`) | Confirm this is intended; no literal change needed unless you want explicit zero-init |\n245\t| 4 | `internal/tracking/tracker.go:160` | `tracking.Blob` (2D, legacy) | Same as above | Same; also confirm whether the legacy 2D tracker is still in the live path (bf-67ao notes the 3D `tracker` package is active) |\n246\t\n247\t### Tier 3 — Identity-carrying type but built from a pre-identity source (no-op by design)\n248\t\n249\t| # | File:line | Type | Why no identity yet | Action |\n250\t|---|---|---|---|---|\n251\t| 5 | `cmd/mothership/main.go:5384` | `sigproc.TrackedBlob` | Built from a `fusion.Blob` **peak** (peaks have no identity — identity is assigned by the tracker *after* this) | None, unless identity is reattached from a prior frame's tracker state |\n252\t\n253\t### Tier 4 — JS/dashboard identity plumbing\n254\t\n255\t| # | File | What | Action |\n256\t|---|---|---|---|\n257\t| 6 | `dashboard/types/spaxel.d.ts` | `Blob` interface — canonical JS identity-field declaration | If the JS schema changes, update here (single declaration point) |\n258\t| 6 | `dashboard/js/state.js:290` | Blob creation literal is now `{ id: id }` only | If pre-initializing identity fields at creation is desired, add them here (currently relies on server payload via `Object.assign`) |\n259\t| 6 | `dashboard/js/ambient_renderer.js:624–647` | Identity-field **consumption** (fallback chain `personName → person_label → person`) | Update the fallback chain if field names change; this reads, doesn't create |\n260\t\n261\t### Out of scope (no identity fields, by design)\n262\t\n263\t- `fusion/fusion.go:260` (peak — pre-identity)\n264\t- `simulator/engine.go:460`, `replay/pipeline.go:114/132` (synthetic/demo — no real identity)\n265\t- `explainability/handler.go:194/255` (empty fallbacks for unknown IDs)\n266\t- `falldetect/detector.go:277` (history snapshot — posture/velocity only; add identity only if fall alerts need person names, which per plan.md they do → consider promoting to Tier 1)\n267\t- All `*_test.go` / `*.test.js` fixtures (update only if struct schemas change and break tests)\n268\t- All four `new Blob()` file-download sites (§4 — unrelated browser API)\n269\t\n270\t---\n271\t\n272\t## 6. Blob data flow (where identity enters and where it leaks)\n273\t\n274\t```\n275\tfusion.Engine.Fuse  ──fusion.Blob peaks──▶  (NO identity)\n276\t   [C1 :260]                                    │\n277\t                                                ▼\n278\tblobTracker.track  ──sigproc.TrackedBlob──▶  (fields exist, zero — peak source)\n279\t   [E1 main.go:5384]                            │\n280\t                                                ▼\n281\ttracker.Tracker.Update  ──tracker.Blob──▶  (spawned; identity fields zero)\n282\t   [A1 tracker.go:162]                          │\n283\t                                                ▼\n284\tTrackManager.UpdateWithIdentity ──applyIdentity──▶  ✅ IDENTITY ATTACHED\n285\t   [A3 identity.go:77 → 164]                    │\n286\t                                                ▼\n287\tGetAllBlobs / GetBlob ──copies to consumers──▶  (identity preserved)\n288\t   [B1/B2 identity.go:188/201]                  │\n289\t              ┌─────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┐\n290\t              ▼                                  ▼                          ▼\n291\t   automation loop                     explainability loop            falldetect.processBlob\n292\t   [E2 main.go:2213]                   [E3 main.go:2116]              [G1 detector.go:277]\n293\t   ❌ IDENTITY DROPPED                  ❌ IDENTITY DROPPED            ⚠ posture/vel only\n294\t   (automation.TrackedBlob             (explainability.BlobSnapshot   (add identity if fall\n295\t    has no identity fields)             drops person/color)            alerts need a name)\n296\t```\n297\t\n298\tThe two ❌ sites are the leak this work should close.\n299\t\n300\t---\n301\t\n302\t## 7. TL;DR\n\n| Question | Answer |\n|---|---|\n| How many **Spaxel domain blob** creation sites exist? | **19 production sites** across **9 files** (Go + JS) |\n| How many distinct blob **types**? | **10 in Go** + **1 TS interface** (`dashboard/types/spaxel.d.ts`) |\n| Are there `NewBlob`/`makeBlob`/`CreateBlob` helpers? | **No.** Every blob is an inline struct/object literal inside its enclosing function. |\n| Do the source findings agree? | Mostly. Two stale entries corrected (see §1.2). |\n| What needs editing for **blob identity fields**? | **6 files** — see §5 (the deliverable the next bead consumes). |\n\n---\n\n## 1. Critical reconciliation notes (read before the inventory)\n\n### 1.1 Two unrelated concepts share the word \"blob\"\n\nThe three search beads conflated two completely different things. This report keeps them\nstrictly separate:\n\n| Concept | Where | What it is | Identity fields? |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| **Spaxel domain blob** (the tracked spatial presence) | `mothership/**` (Go) + `dashboard/js/**` (JS) | A detected person: position + velocity + posture + **identity** | **Yes** — the whole point of this work |\n| **Browser `Blob` API** (binary data for downloads) | `dashboard/**/fleet*.js` | `new Blob([bytes], {type:'text/csv'})` — a file-download payload | **No** — unrelated; do **not** touch for identity work |\n\nThe `new Blob()` sites from bf-5kns are all the second kind. They are catalogued in §4 only\nso the next bead knows they exist and can **skip them**.\n\n### 1.2 Corrections to the source findings (verified against HEAD)\n\n1. **`dashboard/js/state.js:290`** — bf-26ta reported the literal initializes\n   `{id, personName:undefined, assignedColor:undefined, identityResolved:undefined}`.\n   **Actual current code is just `{ id: id }`.** The identity fields are no longer\n   pre-initialized; `Object.assign(appState.blobs[id], updates)` later merges server data in.\n   Implication: if identity-field initialization at creation is desired, this site is a\n   candidate to revisit — but it currently does **not** set them.\n\n2. **`mothership/internal/tracking/tracker.go:160` (2D `tracking.Blob`)** — bf-26ta claimed the\n   literal explicitly sets `PersonName:\"\", AssignedColor:\"\", IdentityResolved:false`.\n   **Wrong on all three field names.** The struct's identity fields are\n   `PersonID / PersonLabel / PersonColor / IdentityConfidence / IdentitySource / IdentityLastSeen`\n   (same as the 3D `tracker.Blob`), and the literal sets **none** of them — it relies on Go\n   zero values. See §3, entries [G2]/[A2].\n\n3. **Go ↔ JS identity field names differ** (this is intentional, not an error — but the next\n   bead must know both):\n\n   | Concept | Go field (`tracker.Blob`, `tracking.Blob`, `sigproc.TrackedBlob`) | JS field (`spaxel.d.ts` Blob interface) |\n   |---|---|---|\n   | Display name | `PersonLabel` | `personName` (preferred) / `personLabel` (deprecated) |\n   | Stable person id | `PersonID` | `personId` |\n   | Render color | `PersonColor` | `assignedColor` (preferred) / `personColor` (deprecated) |\n   | Identity resolved flag | `IdentityConfidence` (float) + `IdentitySource` | `identityResolved` (bool) |\n   | Match provenance | `IdentitySource` (`\"ble_triangulation\"` / `\"ble_only\"` / `\"\"`) | `identityResolved` tri-state |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Inventory — organized by FILE\n\n### 2.1 Go production files\n\n| File | Sites | Blob type(s) | Creation mechanism |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `mothership/internal/fusion/fusion.go` | 1 (`:260`) | `fusion.Blob` | array assignment `blobs[i] = Blob{...}` |\n| `mothership/internal/tracker/tracker.go` | 1 (`:162`) | `tracker.Blob` (3D) | pointer literal `&Blob{...}` in `(*Tracker).Update` |\n| `mothership/internal/tracking/tracker.go` | 1 (`:160`) | `tracking.Blob` (2D, legacy) | pointer literal `&Blob{...}` in `(*Tracker).Update` |\n| `mothership/cmd/mothership/main.go` | 3 (`:5384`, `:2213`, `:2116`) | `sigproc.TrackedBlob`, `automation.TrackedBlob`, `explainability.BlobSnapshot` | inline conversion loops |\n| `mothership/internal/simulator/engine.go` | 1 (`:460`) | `simulator.BlobResult` | slice append in `detectBlobs` |\n| `mothership/internal/replay/pipeline.go` | 2 (`:114`, `:132`) | `replay.BlobUpdate` | slice appends in `generateDemoBlobs` |\n| `mothership/internal/explainability/handler.go` | 3 (`:357`, `:194`, `:255`) | `explainability.BlobExplanation` | pointer literals (`:357` substantive; `:194`/`:255` empty fallbacks) |\n\n**Go subtotal: 12 production creation sites across 7 files.**\n\n### 2.2 Go test-only files (out of scope for identity-field edits, listed for completeness)\n\n| File | Site | Type | Note |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `internal/explainability/handler_test.go` | `:30`/`:31` | `explainability.BlobSnapshot` | `makeBlobAt(...)` test helper |\n| `internal/replay/integration_test.go` | `:578`, `:606` | `replay.BlobUpdate` | pipeline-over-test-frames (no own literal) |\n| `internal/api/tracks_test.go` | `:17` | `TrackedBlob` | mock provider |\n| `internal/volume/shape_test.go` | inline | `volume.BlobPos` | `[]BlobPos{{ID:1,X:2,Y:2,Z:2}}` fixtures |\n\n### 2.3 JS production files\n\n| File | Sites | Pattern | Identity fields set? |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `dashboard/js/state.js` | 1 (`:290`) | `appState.blobs[id] = { id: id }` then `Object.assign` | **No** (corrected — see §1.2) |\n| `dashboard/js/websocket.js` | 1 (`:167`) | `_blobStates.set(b.id, {x,z,vx,vz,ts})` | No — dead-reckoning extrapolation cache only |\n\n### 2.4 JS test-only files\n\n| File | Sites | Pattern |\n|---|---|---|\n| `dashboard/js/ambient.test.js` | 6 (`:124`, `:276`, `:642`, `:659`, `:694`, `:708`) | rendering test fixtures (full / minimal / position-only) |\n| `dashboard/js/quick-actions.test.js` | 5 (`:208`, `:316`, `:470`, `:513`, `:678`) | context-menu / camera-follow fixtures |\n| `dashboard/js/replay.test.js` | 1 (`:101`) | mock API response (velocity + posture) |\n\n**JS subtotal: 2 production + 12 test = 14 sites across 5 files** (matches bf-26ta's corrected total).\n\n### 2.5 TypeScript\n\n- `dashboard/types/spaxel.d.ts` (`:10`–`~95`) — the **`Blob` interface** definition only.\n  **Zero object-literal instantiations.** It is the canonical declaration of the JS-side\n  identity fields (`personName`, `personId`, `assignedColor`, `personColor` [deprecated],\n  `personLabel` [deprecated], `identityResolved`). If the JS identity schema changes, this\n  file is the single declaration to update.\n\n---\n\n## 3. Inventory — organized by CREATION PATTERN\n\n### Pattern 1 — Peak emission (origin of every blob)\n- **[C1] `(*fusion.Engine).Fuse`** — `fusion/fusion.go:165` → literal `:260`\n  ```go\n  blobs[i] = Blob{X: p[0], Y: p[1], Z: p[2], Confidence: p[3]}\n  ```\n  Value-type per grid peak. **No identity** (peaks are pre-identity). This is the raw\n  measurement fed downstream.\n\n### Pattern 2 — Persistent track spawn (where identity is attached)\n- **[A1] `(*tracker.Tracker).Update` (3D)** — `tracker/tracker.go:112` → literal `:162`\n  ```go\n  b := &Blob{ID: t.nextID, X: m[0], Y: m[1], Z: m[2], Weight: m[3],\n      LastSeen: now, Trail: ..., Posture: PostureUnknown, ukf: NewUKF(...)}\n  ```\n  Pointer per unmatched measurement. **Identity fields exist on the struct but are NOT set\n  in the literal** (zero-valued: `\"\"`/`0`/zero-time). Identity is stamped later by `applyIdentity`.\n- **[A3] `(*tracker.TrackManager).Update[WithIdentity]`** — `tracker/identity.go:63,77`\n  Thin wrappers over A1; delegate creation, then call `applyIdentity(blob, info, now)`\n  (`identity.go:164`) to populate identity in place. **No literal of their own.**\n- **[A2] `(*tracking.Tracker).Update` (2D, legacy)** — `tracking/tracker.go:91` → literal `:160`\n  Same shape as A1 but 2D `[x,z,weight]`. Struct carries the same identity fields; literal\n  sets none of them.\n\n### Pattern 3 — Accessor factories (hand copies/pointers to callers)\n- **[B1] `(*tracker.TrackManager).GetBlob`** — `tracker/identity.go:188` — returns `&tm.blobs[i]`\n  (pointer into internal storage).\n- **[B2] `(*tracker.TrackManager).GetAllBlobs`** — `tracker/identity.go:201` — `make`+`copy`\n  value slice. **Note:** shallow copy — trail header shared, not deep-copied.\n\n### Pattern 4 — Cross-package conversion (identity-propagation boundary — see §5)\n- **[E1] `(*blobTracker).track`** — `cmd/mothership/main.go:5337` → literal `:5384`\n  ```go\n  b := sigproc.TrackedBlob{ID: id, X: pk.X, Y: pk.Y, Z: pk.Z, Weight: pk.Confidence}\n  ```\n  Converts a `fusion.Blob` peak → `sigproc.TrackedBlob`. `sigproc.TrackedBlob` **has identity\n  fields** but they're left zero here because the source is a pre-identity peak.\n- **[E2] automation conversion loop** — `cmd/mothership/main.go:2213`\n  ```go\n  autoBlobs[i] = automation.TrackedBlob{ID: b.ID, X/Z, VX/VY/VZ, Confidence: b.Weight}\n  ```\n  `automation.TrackedBlob` has **NO identity fields** (struct is ID + pos + vel + Confidence\n  only). Identity is **dropped** at this boundary.\n- **[E3] explainability conversion loop** — `cmd/mothership/main.go:2116`\n  ```go\n  blobSnapshots = append(blobSnapshots, explainability.BlobSnapshot{\n      ID: blob.ID, X/Y/Z, Confidence: blob.Weight})\n  ```\n  `explainability.BlobSnapshot` struct — identity **dropped** (only the 5 fields shown).\n\n### Pattern 5 — Synthetic/demo factories (offline + test paths)\n- **[D1] `(*simulator.Engine).detectBlobs`** — `simulator/engine.go:387` → `:460` —\n  `append(blobs, BlobResult{ID, Position, Confidence, WalkerID, TrueError})`.\n- **[D2] `(*replay.Pipeline).generateDemoBlobs`** — `replay/pipeline.go:100` → `:114`,`:132` —\n  two fixed-ID figure-8 / circular synthetic `BlobUpdate`s.\n\n### Pattern 6 — Explainability record factories\n- **[F1] `(*explainability.Handler).computeExplanation`** — `handler.go:356` → `:357` —\n  substantive `&BlobExplanation{BlobID, X/Y/Z, Confidence, ContributingLinks, ...}`. Cached\n  into `h.blobHistory[blob.ID]`.\n- **[F2] `(*explainability.Handler).explainBlob`** — `handler.go:180` → `:194` —\n  empty fallback `&BlobExplanation{...0...}` for unknown ID.\n- **[F3] `(*explainability.Handler).explainBlobAtTime`** — `handler.go:209` → `:255` —\n  empty fallback (with `Timestamp`) when no history match.\n- **[F4] `(*explainability.Handler).GetExplanationForBlob`** — `handler.go:276` —\n  lookup accessor returning cached `*BlobExplanation` (no literal).\n\n### Pattern 7 — Snapshot recorder (blob-derived record, not a returned blob)\n- **[G1] `(*falldetect.Detector).processBlob`** — `falldetect/detector.go:270` → `:277` —\n  `BlobSnapshot{ID, X/Y/Z, VX/VY/VZ, Posture, Timestamp}` appended to `d.blobHistory`.\n  (Distinct type from `explainability.BlobSnapshot` despite the shared name.)\n\n### Pattern 8 — JS state initialization\n- **`dashboard/js/state.js:290`** — `appState.blobs[id] = { id: id }` (+ later `Object.assign`\n  of server payload). Identity fields only appear if the server sends them.\n\n### Pattern 9 — JS derived/extrapolation state\n- **`dashboard/js/websocket.js:167`** — `_blobStates.set(b.id, {x,z,vx,vz,ts})`. Minimal\n  dead-reckoning cache for disconnect extrapolation. Not a domain blob.\n\n---\n\n## 4. Unrelated `new Blob()` constructor sites (bf-5kns) — SKIP for identity work\n\nThese are the **browser binary `Blob` API** used for file downloads. They construct file\npayloads, not Spaxel domain blobs. Catalogued only so the next bead can consciously skip them.\n\n| File:line | MIME type | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|\n| `dashboard/static/js/fleet.js:457` | `text/csv` | fleet data CSV download (`downloadCSV`) |\n| `dashboard/js/fleet-page.js:1034` | `application/json` | config JSON export (`exportConfig`) |\n| `dashboard/js/fleet-page.js:1369` | `text/csv` | filtered fleet CSV download (`downloadCSV`) |\n| `dashboard/js/fleet.js:1997` | `application/json` | config JSON export (`exportConfig`) |\n\nAll four follow the same idiom: `new Blob([content], { type: '...' })`. **Zero TypeScript\n`new Blob()` calls exist.**\n\n---\n\n## 5. Files requiring updates for blob identity fields ⭐ (the deliverable)\n\nThe goal of the umbrella effort is to make blob **identity** (who the blob is) flow correctly\nthrough the pipeline. Identity currently lives in **three** Go types and the JS interface,\nand is **dropped at two conversion boundaries**. Ranked by impact:\n\n### Tier 1 — Identity is DROPPED at conversion (must add fields + propagate)\n\n| # | File:line | What's dropped | Source has it? | Target type | Fix |\n|---|---|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | `cmd/mothership/main.go:2213` | person/color/source from tracked blob | **Yes** (`blobs[i]` is identity-bearing) | `automation.TrackedBlob` | Add identity fields to `automation.TrackedBlob` (`engine.go:1337`); populate them in the loop |\n| 2 | `cmd/mothership/main.go:2116` | person/color from tracked blob | **Yes** | `explainability.BlobSnapshot` | Add identity fields to the snapshot type; populate so \"Why?\" can name the person |\n\n> These two are the highest-value edits: without them, person-aware automations and\n> person-labeled explainability cannot work even when BLE identity is fully resolved upstream.\n\n### Tier 2 — Identity fields exist but literal doesn't set them (verify intent)\n\n| # | File:line | Type | Current state | Action |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| 3 | `internal/tracker/tracker.go:162` | `tracker.Blob` (3D) | Identity fields zero-valued; populated later by `applyIdentity` (`identity.go:164`) | Confirm this is intended; no literal change needed unless you want explicit zero-init |\n| 4 | `internal/tracking/tracker.go:160` | `tracking.Blob` (2D, legacy) | Same as above | Same; also confirm whether the legacy 2D tracker is still in the live path (bf-67ao notes the 3D `tracker` package is active) |\n\n### Tier 3 — Identity-carrying type but built from a pre-identity source (no-op by design)\n\n| # | File:line | Type | Why no identity yet | Action |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| 5 | `cmd/mothership/main.go:5384` | `sigproc.TrackedBlob` | Built from a `fusion.Blob` **peak** (peaks have no identity — identity is assigned by the tracker *after* this) | None, unless identity is reattached from a prior frame's tracker state |\n\n### Tier 4 — JS/dashboard identity plumbing\n\n| # | File | What | Action |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| 6 | `dashboard/types/spaxel.d.ts` | `Blob` interface — canonical JS identity-field declaration | If the JS schema changes, update here (single declaration point) |\n| 6 | `dashboard/js/state.js:290` | Blob creation literal is now `{ id: id }` only | If pre-initializing identity fields at creation is desired, add them here (currently relies on server payload via `Object.assign`) |\n| 6 | `dashboard/js/ambient_renderer.js:624–647` | Identity-field **consumption** (fallback chain `personName → person_label → person`) | Update the fallback chain if field names change; this reads, doesn't create |\n\n### Out of scope (no identity fields, by design)\n\n- `fusion/fusion.go:260` (peak — pre-identity)\n- `simulator/engine.go:460`, `replay/pipeline.go:114/132` (synthetic/demo — no real identity)\n- `explainability/handler.go:194/255` (empty fallbacks for unknown IDs)\n- `falldetect/detector.go:277` (history snapshot — posture/velocity only; add identity only if fall alerts need person names, which per plan.md they do → consider promoting to Tier 1)\n- All `*_test.go` / `*.test.js` fixtures (update only if struct schemas change and break tests)\n- All four `new Blob()` file-download sites (§4 — unrelated browser API)\n\n---\n\n## 6. Blob data flow (where identity enters and where it leaks)\n\n```\nfusion.Engine.Fuse  ──fusion.Blob peaks──▶  (NO identity)\n   [C1 :260]                                    │\n                                                ▼\nblobTracker.track  ──sigproc.TrackedBlob──▶  (fields exist, zero — peak source)\n   [E1 main.go:5384]                            │\n                                                ▼\ntracker.Tracker.Update  ──tracker.Blob──▶  (spawned; identity fields zero)\n   [A1 tracker.go:162]                          │\n                                                ▼\nTrackManager.UpdateWithIdentity ──applyIdentity──▶  ✅ IDENTITY ATTACHED\n   [A3 identity.go:77 → 164]                    │\n                                                ▼\nGetAllBlobs / GetBlob ──copies to consumers──▶  (identity preserved)\n   [B1/B2 identity.go:188/201]                  │\n              ┌─────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┐\n              ▼                                  ▼                          ▼\n   automation loop                     explainability loop            falldetect.processBlob\n   [E2 main.go:2213]                   [E3 main.go:2116]              [G1 detector.go:277]\n   ❌ IDENTITY DROPPED                  ❌ IDENTITY DROPPED            ⚠ posture/vel only\n   (automation.TrackedBlob             (explainability.BlobSnapshot   (add identity if fall\n    has no identity fields)             drops person/color)            alerts need a name)\n```\n\nThe two ❌ sites are the leak this work should close.\n\n---\n\n## 7. New blob from measurement\n118\t```go\n119\tb := &Blob{\n120\t    ID:       t.nextID,\n121\t    X:        meas[0],\n122\t    Z:        meas[1],\n123\t    Weight:   meas[2],\n124\t    LastSeen: now,\n125\t    Trail:    [][2]float64{{meas[0], meas[1]}},\n126\t    ukf:      NewUKF(meas[0], meas[1]),\n127\t    // Initialize identity fields with default values\n128\t    PersonName:       \"\",\n129\t    AssignedColor:    \"\",\n130\t    IdentityResolved: false,\n131\t}\n132\t```\n133\t- **Context**: Tracker.Update() when unmatched measurements create new tracks\n134\t- **Pattern**: Pointer construction, initializes ID, position, weight, trail, UKF filter\n135\t\n136\t#### 1.2 `tracker/tracker.go:162` - New 3D blob from measurement\n137\t```go\n138\tb := &Blob{\n139\t    ID: t.nextID,\n140\t    X:  m[0], Y: m[1], Z: m[2],\n141\t    Weight:   m[3],\n142\t    LastSeen: now,\n143\t    Trail:    [][3]float64{{m[0], m[1], m[2]}},\n144\t    Posture:  PostureUnknown,\n145\t    ukf:      NewUKF(m[0], m[1], m[2]),\n146\t}\n147\t```\n148\t- **Context**: Tracker.Update() when unmatched measurements create new 3D tracks\n149\t- **Pattern**: Similar to 1.1 but with Y coordinate and Posture field\n150\t\n151\t---\n152\t\n153\t### Pattern 2: Value-type construction with `Blob{}`\n154\t\n155\t#### 2.1 `fusion/fusion.go:260` - Blob from peak detection\n156\t```go\n157\tblobs[i] = Blob{X: p[0], Y: p[1], Z: p[2], Confidence: p[3]}\n158\t```\n159\t- **Context**: Engine.Fuse() converting fusion grid peaks to blobs\n160\t- **Pattern**: Value-type construction from 4-element peak array [x, y, z, confidence]\n161\t\n162\t---\n163\t\n164\t### Pattern 3: Slice allocation and copying\n165\t\n166\t#### 3.1 `tracking/tracker.go:199-203` - There are **FIVE distinct primary Blob types** across different packages (the tracked-blob lifecycle), plus **seven additional Blob-shaped projection types** that are derived from blobs for specific subsystems (see \"Related Blob-shaped projection types\" below).\n\n1. **`tracking.Blob`** - 2D floor tracker (X, Z coordinates)\n2. **`tracker.Blob`** - 3D tracker with identity support (X, Y, Z coordinates + posture)\n3. **`fusion.Blob`** - Simple fusion result (X, Y, Z + confidence)\n4. **`automation.TrackedBlob`** - Automation engine blob representation\n5. **`signal.TrackedBlob`** - Fusion-to-tracking pipeline blob (X, Y, Z + velocity + identity fields)\n\n> **Line numbers verified against current `main` (2026-07-06).** Sites move by a few lines as the codebase evolves; re-locate with `grep -n \"&Blob{\\|Blob{\\|TrackedBlob{\" mothership/` before editing.\n\n---\n\n## Blob Type Definitions\n\n### 1. `tracking.Blob` (mothership/internal/tracking/tracker.go:21)\n```go\ntype Blob struct {\n    ID       int\n    X        float64 // metres, room X\n    Z        float64 // metres, room Z\n    VX       float64 // m/s\n    VZ       float64 // m/s\n    Weight   float64 // localisation confidence [0..1]\n    LastSeen time.Time\n    Trail    [][2]float64\n    ukf      *UKF\n    \n    // Identity fields\n    PersonID           string\n    PersonLabel        string\n    PersonColor        string\n    PersonName         string\n    AssignedColor      string\n    IdentityResolved   bool\n    IdentityConfidence float64\n    IdentitySource     string\n    IdentityLastSeen   time.Time\n    Posture            Posture\n}\n```\n\n### 2. `tracker.Blob` (mothership/internal/tracker/tracker.go:36)\n```go\ntype Blob struct {\n    ID         int\n    X, Y, Z    float64 // world-space position, metres\n    VX, VY, VZ float64 // velocity, m/s\n    Weight     float64 // detection confidence [0..1]\n    Posture    Posture\n    LastSeen   time.Time\n    Trail      [][3]float64\n    \n    // Identity fields\n    PersonID           string\n    PersonLabel        string\n    PersonColor        string\n    IdentityConfidence float64\n    IdentitySource     string\n    IdentityLastSeen   time.Time\n    ukf *UKF\n}\n```\n\n### 3. `fusion.Blob` (mothership/internal/fusion/fusion.go:36)\n```go\ntype Blob struct {\n    X, Y, Z    float64 // world-space position (metres)\n    Confidence float64 // normalised [0..1]\n}\n```\n\n### 4. `automation.TrackedBlob` (mothership/internal/automation/engine.go:1337)\n```go\ntype TrackedBlob struct {\n    ID         int\n    X, Y, Z    float64\n    VX, VY, VZ float64\n    Confidence float64\n}\n```\n\n### 5. `signal.TrackedBlob` (mothership/internal/signal/processor.go:587)\n\n> **Type alias:** `api.TrackedBlob` at `mothership/internal/api/tracks.go:30` is a\n> pure alias (`type TrackedBlob = signal.TrackedBlob`), not a new struct. Any field\n> change to `signal.TrackedBlob` propagates to `api.TrackedBlob` automatically —\n> no separate edit needed, but be aware the type surfaces under two names.\n```go\ntype TrackedBlob struct {\n    ID         int\n    X, Y, Z    float64\n    VX, VY, VZ float64\n    Weight     float64\n    \n    // Identity fields\n    PersonID           string\n    PersonLabel        string\n    PersonColor        string\n    IdentityConfidence float64\n    IdentitySource     string\n    Posture            string\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Blob Creation Sites\n\n### Pattern 1: Direct struct construction with `&Blob{}`\n\n#### 1.1 `tracking/tracker.go:160` - New blob from measurement\n```go\nb := &Blob{\n    ID:       t.nextID,\n    X:        meas[0],\n    Z:        meas[1],\n    Weight:   meas[2],\n    LastSeen: now,\n    Trail:    [][2]float64{{meas[0], meas[1]}},\n    ukf:      NewUKF(meas[0], meas[1]),\n    // Initialize identity fields with default values\n    PersonName:       \"\",\n    AssignedColor:    \"\",\n    IdentityResolved: false,\n}\n```\n- **Context**: Tracker.Update() when unmatched measurements create new tracks\n- **Pattern**: Pointer construction, initializes ID, position, weight, trail, UKF filter\n\n#### 1.2 `tracker/tracker.go:162` - New 3D blob from measurement\n```go\nb := &Blob{\n    ID: t.nextID,\n    X:  m[0], Y: m[1], Z: m[2],\n    Weight:   m[3],\n    LastSeen: now,\n    Trail:    [][3]float64{{m[0], m[1], m[2]}},\n    Posture:  PostureUnknown,\n    ukf:      NewUKF(m[0], m[1], m[2]),\n}\n```\n- **Context**: Tracker.Update() when unmatched measurements create new 3D tracks\n- **Pattern**: Similar to 1.1 but with Y coordinate and Posture field\n\n---\n\n### Pattern 2: Value-type construction with `Blob{}`\n\n#### 2.1 `fusion/fusion.go:260` - The extra fields `PersonName`,\n> `AssignedColor`, `IdentityResolved` belong only to `tracking.Blob` (2D).\n\n#### applyIdentity() - Lines 164-176\n```go\nfunc (tm *TrackManager) applyIdentity(blob *Blob, info *IdentityInfo, now time.Time) {\n    blob.PersonID = info.PersonID\n    blob.PersonLabel = info.PersonLabel\n    blob.PersonColor = info.PersonColor\n    blob.IdentityConfidence = info.IdentityConfidence\n    blob.IdentityLastSeen = now\n\n    if info.IdentitySource != \"\" {\n        blob.IdentitySource = info.IdentitySource\n    } else {\n        blob.IdentitySource = \"ble_triangulation\"\n    }\n}\n```\n- **Context**: Applying BLE identity match to blob\n- **Pattern**: Field mutation on existing blob pointer\n\n#### clearIdentity() - Lines 179-185\n```go\nfunc (tm *TrackManager) clearIdentity(blob *Blob) {\n    blob.PersonID = \"\"\n    blob.PersonLabel = \"\"\n    blob.PersonColor = \"\"\n    blob.IdentityConfidence = 0\n    blob.IdentitySource = \"\"\n}\n```\n- **Context**: Clearing identity when match expires\n- **Pattern**: Resetting identity fields to defaults\n\n---\n\n## Related Blob-shaped projection types\n\nBeyond the five primary Blob types above, the codebase defines seven additional\n`Blob*`-named structs. Snapshot deep-copies (`out[i] = *b`,\\n> `make`+`copy`) are **dereferences / slice copies, not literals** — out of scope here and\\n> correctly excluded from bf-4bhd's Pattern 3 as separate operations.\\n\\nA whole-repo sweep\\n(`grep -rn \\\"Blob{\\\\|TrackedBlob{\\\" mothership/`, test files excluded, projection-type\\nliterals filtered out) returns **exactly five** production construction sites — one per\\nprimary type:\\n\\n| # | Type built | Site (HEAD) | Site in prior reports | Pattern | Built from |\\n|---|---|---|---|---|---|\\n| C1 | `fusion.Blob` | `internal/fusion/fusion.go:260` | `:260` ✓ | `Blob{}` value (single line) | fusion grid peak |\\n| A2 | `tracking.Blob` (2D) | `internal/tracking/tracker.go:160` | `:160` ✓ | `&Blob{}` pointer | unmatched 2D measurement |\\n| A1 | `tracker.Blob` (3D) | `internal/tracker/tracker.go:162` | `:162` ✓ | `&Blob{}` pointer | unmatched 3D measurement |\\n| E2 | `automation.TrackedBlob` | `cmd/mothership/main.go:2303` | **`:2213` → moved +90** | `TrackedBlob{}` value | tracked blob (conversion) |\\n| E1 | `signal.TrackedBlob` (`sigproc`) | `cmd/mothership/main.go:5494` | **`:5384` → moved +110** | `TrackedBlob{}` value | `fusion.Blob` peak (conversion) |\\n\\n**No other production direct-literal sites exist** for any of the five types. The two `main.go`\\nsites are the only ones that moved; the two tracker sites and the fusion site are unchanged.\\n\\n### 2.1 Literal text (verified, verbatim)\\n\\n**C1 — `fusion.Blob` peak emission** (`fusion/fusion.go:260`), inside `(*Engine).Fuse`:\\n```go\\nblobs[i] = Blob{X: p[0], Y: p[1], Z: p[2], Confidence: p[3]}\\n```\\nValue-type per grid peak. **No identity** — peaks are pre-identity. This is the raw\\nmeasurement that originates every blob downstream.\\n\\n**A2 — `tracking.Blob` (2D) track spawn** (`tracking/tracker.go:160`), inside `(*Tracker).Update`:\\n```go\\nb := &Blob{\\n    ID:       t.nextID,\\n    X:        meas[0],\\n    Z:        meas[1],\\n    Weight:   meas[2],\\n    LastSeen: now,\\n    Trail:    [][2]float64{{meas[0], meas[1]}},\\n    ukf:      NewUKF(meas[0], meas[1]),\\n}\\n```\\nIdentity fields exist on the struct (see §3.1) but are **not set** in the literal — left at\\nGo zero values, populated later by the BLE-matching layer.\\n\\n**A1 — `tracker.Blob` (3D) track spawn** (`tracker/tracker.go:162`), inside `(*Tracker).Update`:\\n```go\\nb := &Blob{\\n    ID: t.nextID,\\n    X:  m[0], Y: m[1], Z: m[2],\\n    Weight:   m[3],\\n    LastSeen: now,\\n    Trail:    [][3]float64{{m[0], m[1], m[2]}},\\n    Posture:  PostureUnknown,\\n    ukf:      NewUKF(m[0], m[1], m[2]),\\n}\\n```\\nIdentity fields exist on the struct but are **not set** in the literal — populated later by\\n`applyIdentity` (`tracker/identity.go`, the 3D identity-matching layer).\\n\\n**E2 — `automation.TrackedBlob` conversion** (`cmd/mothership/main.go:2303`), in the live\\n10 Hz loop, loop over tracked `blobs`:\\n```go\\nautoBlobs[i] = automation.TrackedBlob{\\n    ID:         b.ID,\\n    X:          b.X,\\n    Y:          b.Y,\\n    Z:          b.Z,\\n    VX:         b.VX,\\n    VY:         b.VY,\\n    VZ:         b.VZ,\\n    Confidence: b.Weight,\\n}\\n```\\nThe source blob **has identity**, but `automation.TrackedBlob` (see §3.4) has **no identity\\nfields** — identity is **dropped** at this boundary. (This is the long-standing \\\"automation\\nleak\\\" flagged in bf-3ldj §5 Tier 1; re-confirmed unchanged at HEAD.)\\n\\n**E1 — `signal.TrackedBlob` (`sigproc`) conversion** (`cmd/mothership/main.go:5494`), inside\\n`(*blobTracker).track`, built from a `fusion.Blob` peak `pk`:\\n```go\\nb := sigproc.TrackedBlob{\\n    ID:     id,\\n    X:      pk.X,\\n    Y:      pk.Y,\\n    Z:      pk.Z,\\n    Weight: pk.Confidence,\\n}\\n// velocity filled in afterward from bt.prev[id]:\\n//   b.VX = (pk.X - pb.X) / dt ; b.VY = ... ; b.VZ = ...\\n```\\nBuilt from a **pre-identity peak**, so the `signal.TrackedBlob` identity fields (which do\\nexist — see §3.5) are left zero here by design.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. Consequences:\n\n- `api.TrackedBlob` and `signal.TrackedBlob` are the **same type** — no conversion needed.\n- Any field added/removed on `signal.TrackedBlob` (`processor.go:587`) **automatically** surfaces\n  under the `api.TrackedBlob` name.
